query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "n!: i64"
               FROM books b
               WHERE b.book_id = ?
                 AND b.publisher_id IS NOT NULL
                 AND b.publisher_id IN (
                     SELECT b2.publisher_id FROM books b2
                     WHERE b2.author_id = ? AND b2.book_id <> ?
                       AND b2.publisher_id IS NOT NULL
                 )
